title: Error log entry
description: Schema for entries in skills/error-log/SKILL.md. Validated by tools/validate_rules.py in CI.

count.description: How many times this error has been observed (with derived rule active).

context.description: 1-3 sentences: what task was being worked on, in what project.

what_happened.description: What the agent actually did. Code snippet allowed inside fenced block.

impact.description: Concrete consequences (downtime, data loss, time spent, etc.).

resolution.description: What was done to fix the error.

new_rule.description: Action directive starting with one of: Always, Never, Before, After, Prefer, Avoid, Use, Do, Ensure.

target_file.description: Where the derived rule was added. Format: skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md.

evidence.description: Optional evidence linking this entry to real artefacts: commits, PRs, or CI runs that prove the bug existed and was fixed. All sub-fields are optional; include whatever is verifiable.

commit_sha.description: Short or full hex SHA of the commit where the bug landed (or was fixed).

pr_number.description: PR number where the issue was discussed or the fix landed.

failing_run_url.description: URL of the CI run that reproduces the failing state.

fixed_run_url.description: URL of the CI run that demonstrates the fix is in effect.

reproduced_by_test.description: True if a regression test exists in the repo that reproduces the original bug.
